title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Solara Active Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
